ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Group classification for the file */,
  "size_gb" REAL /* Size of the file in gigabytes */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* General type of the file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "standardized_name" TEXT /* Standardized name for the file format */,
  "format_identification" TEXT /* Identification string for the file format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Common name of the file format */,
  "format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  "registry_name" TEXT /* Name of the registry where the format is listed */,
  "registry_key" TEXT /* Key associated with the registry */,
  "format_note" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the file format */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better search */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_format_type FOREIGN KEY ("format_type") REFERENCES formats ("format_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the group */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* General type of the file format */,
  "standardized_name" TEXT /* Standardized name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the format entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the format entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the format entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the format entry was last updated */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registries" (
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registry */,
  "registry_name" TEXT /* Name of the registry */,
  "registry_description" TEXT /* Description of the registry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the registry entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the registry entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the registry entry */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the registry entry was last updated */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the registry is an official source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_identifications" (
  "identification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identification record */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format being identified */,
  "registry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registry where the format is listed */,
  "format_identification" TEXT /* Identification string for the format */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the identification record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the identification record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the identification record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the identification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_identifications_registry_id FOREIGN KEY ("registry_id") REFERENCES registries ("registry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_identifications_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the file */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
